insight.headline: Customer API Change
insight.what_changed: The Customer Account API version 2026-10 removes the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the related Checkout type subtree. This change affects apps using the Customer Account API. The removal is part of Shopify's efforts to maintain a clean and efficient API. Apps should adjust their code to account for this removal.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their code for any references to the removed fields and update their apps to use alternative approaches. They should also test their apps to ensure compatibility with the updated API. The Storefront API and GraphQL Admin API may be affected, so developers should verify their API versions and adjust accordingly. Migration to the new API version is necessary to avoid breaking changes.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may experience changes in app behavior if the apps they use are not updated to account for the removed fields. Merchants should contact their app developers if they encounter any issues.
insight.why_it_matters: This change matters because it affects how apps interact with customer data, and developers must adapt to maintain compatibility and provide a seamless experience for merchants and their customers. It is part of Shopify's ongoing efforts to improve and refine its APIs.

also_worth_knowing.text: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components

updates.title: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components
updates.summary: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components, allowing apps to access component-level discount allocations from bundle components in cart line item data.
CLI version 4.5.1 is released, which includes a bump of cli-hydrogen to 13.0.1.
CLI version 4.5.0 introduces new store commands, including listing and store creation.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1 patch changes include reading disabled command metadata and preserving actionable build errors during h2 deploy.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38 adds an explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: skeleton@2026.4.5 adds an explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners is now available, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

updates.title: App Pricing: more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events
updates.summary: App Pricing updates include increased plan limits, no-charge plan testing, and support for negative and fractional App Events.

updates.title: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts
updates.summary: POS UI extensions 2026-07 uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts, requiring apps to pass per-unit discounts to setLineItemDiscount and bulkSetLineItemDiscounts.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Changes to Action extensions result in fewer breaking changes
updates.summary: Shopify Flow updates include changes to Action extensions, resulting in fewer breaking changes and more control over how breaking changes to an action’s configuration fields are handled.

updates.title: Shopify Flow: Action runtime URLs now update automatically
updates.summary: Shopify Flow now resolves an action’s runtime_url on every execution, automatically updating the URL when the app is redeployed.

recap.headline: Shopify updates POS UI extensions, Hydrogen, and App Pricing

themes.title: POS UI Extensions Updates
themes.detail: The POS UI Extensions API version 2026-07 now includes discount allocations to bundle components and uses per-unit fixed-amount line item discounts. Additionally, POS Extensions now support a background extension target, allowing extensions to observe POS events and run background logic without rendering any UI surface.

themes.title: Hydrogen and CLI Updates
themes.detail: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.1, which includes patch changes to read disabled command metadata and preserve actionable build errors during deployment. The @shopify/create-hydrogen package has also been updated to version 5.0.38, adding an explicit ~ app alias to new Hydrogen projects.

themes.title: App Pricing and Security Updates
themes.detail: App Pricing has been updated to include more plans, no-charge plan testing, and negative and fractional App Events. Additionally, identity verification for Shopify Partners has started, aiming to increase trust in the Shopify Partner ecosystem.

actions.text: Update POS UI extensions to use the new 2026-07 API version
Verify identity as a Shopify Partner
